case_for: Hopkins has shown boom upside this season with a 19.3-point outburst in week 3 and a 17.6-point finish in week 18, proving he still has ceiling games when targets funnel his way.
case_against: His recent floor has been shaky with multiple sub-6-point duds (weeks 1, 2, and 4) and a consensus projection nearly 3 points under the 12.0 threshold, suggesting inconsistent target share.
